data_collected.source_quote: Plaid collects account holder information including name, address, phone number, and email address, as well as account transactions (amount, date, type, and description), and account details including account and routing numbers and balance.

purposes_of_collection.source_quote: Plaid only shares personal financial data with third parties to power the services you requested and/or to protect against actual or potential fraud and unauthorized transactions.

sold_to_third_parties.source_quote: Plaid does not sell your personal data.

shared_for_advertising.source_quote: Plaid does not share data for advertising purposes; only to power requested services.

categories: connected third-party apps and services (only as permitted by user and only data needed)
third_party_recipients.source_quote: Plaid will only share the data an app needs, even if the financial institution API returns more—unnecessary data won't be shared.

retention_period.source_quote: Plaid retains your data only as long as it is needed, considering the reason your data was collected and any legal requirements.

access_your_data.source_quote: Consumers can see which apps they've connected to and what data those apps accessed via Plaid's consumer portal.

delete_your_data.source_quote: Consumers can revoke access at any time via Plaid's consumer portal or directly through the third party app.

opt_out_of_sale_sharing.source_quote: Consumers can revoke access to connected apps at any time.

encrypted_in_transit.source_quote: Plaid uses AES-256 and TLS end-to-end encryption to securely share strictly necessary data.

encrypted_at_rest.source_quote: Plaid uses encryption to protect data in transit and at rest.

independent_audits.source_quote: Plaid has ISO 27001 and ISO 27701 certifications and undergoes annual SOC 2 Type II audits.

gaps: GPC and DNT signal handling not mentioned
label_notes: Plaid has strong privacy protections with explicit no-sale and no-advertising policies. High security standards with ISO certifications and TLS/AES-256 encryption. Strong user control over app connections and data sharing. Minimal data collection principle practiced (only shares data needed by apps).
